_comment: Merge into the app repo's .claude/settings.json. Enable the prettier/eslint hook only where those toolchains exist.

hooks.command: f="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.vue|*.css|*.json) npx --no-install prettier --write $f 2>/dev/null; npx --no-install eslint --fix $f 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0
